name: Spinach, Mushroom & Anchovy Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 slice French bread, ½ inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the spinach; discard stalks and add leaves to a shallow salad bowl.
2. Place canned anchovies and their oil in a large saucepan.
3. Add olive oil, warm gently, and crush anchovies with a wooden spoon until they dissolve.
4. Toast French bread on one side only.
5. Brush untoasted side lightly with anchovy oil, then grill until golden.
6. To anchovy mixture remaining in pan, add 2 teaspoons lemon juice and pepper.
7. Slice mushrooms and add to salad bowl.
8. Pour warm anchovy dressing into the salad using a spatula; toss gently.
9. Add sliced mozzarella just before serving; garnish with toasted bread or serve separately, offering wedges of lemon.
